paper_metadata.title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
paper_metadata.abstract: In deep learning, models typically reuse the same parameters for all inputs. Mixture of Experts (MoE) defies this and instead selects different parameters for each incoming example. The result is a sparsely-activated model -- with outrageous numbers of parameters -- but a constant computational cost. However, despite several notable successes of MoE, widespread adoption has been hindered by complexity, communication costs and training instability -- we address these with the Switch Transformer. We simplify the MoE routing algorithm and design intuitive improved models with reduced communication and computational costs. Our proposed training techniques help wrangle the instabilities and we show large sparse models may be trained, for the first time, with lower precision (bfloat16) formats. We design models based off T5-Base and T5-Large to obtain up to 7x increases in pre-training speed with the same computational resources. These improvements extend into multilingual settings where we measure gains over the mT5-Base version across all 101 languages. Finally, we advance the current scale of language models by pre-training up to trillion parameter models on the "Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus" and achieve a 4x speedup over the T5-XXL model.

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture where only one expert is activated per token, enabling efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models. The model uses a router with input jitter for exploration, improving expert load balancing and performance.
extraction_data.extension: Uses a router-based expert selection mechanism that dynamically routes tokens to a small number of specialized experts, reducing computational cost while maintaining model capacity.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling language models efficiently to trillion-parameter regimes while maintaining computational efficiency and model quality
extraction_data.application: Large-scale language modeling, downstream task performance (e.g., SuperGLUE, TriviaQA), efficient model scaling
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a sparse mixture of experts (MoE) architecture with a switch mechanism that routes tokens to a subset of experts, enabling efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models while maintaining low computational cost per token.
extraction_data.application: Large-scale language modeling, efficient training of massive models, scalable inference
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling language models to trillion parameters efficiently
extraction_data.extension: Uses a sparse expert architecture with dynamic routing, where each token is processed by only a few experts, significantly reducing computational cost compared to dense models.
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces the Switch Transformer architecture, which uses a mixture-of-experts (MoE) design with sparse activation, enabling trillion-parameter models with efficient computation by routing tokens to only a subset of experts per layer.
extraction_data.extension: Uses a router-based expert selection mechanism that dynamically routes tokens to a small number of specialized experts, reducing computational cost while maintaining model capacity.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling language models to trillion parameters while maintaining computational efficiency
extraction_data.application: Large-scale language modeling, efficient inference, scalable model training
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces the Switch Transformer architecture, which uses a mixture-of-experts (MoE) design with a sparse routing mechanism. The model routes each token to only one expert per layer, enabling efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models while maintaining low computational cost during inference.
extraction_data.application: Large-scale language modeling, efficient inference, scalable training
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling language models to trillion parameters efficiently
extraction_data.extension: Sparse expert routing via a trainable router that assigns tokens to experts based on probability, with load-balancing loss to ensure even expert utilization.
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces the Switch Transformer architecture, which uses a mixture-of-experts (MoE) design with a sparse routing mechanism. The model routes each token to only one expert per layer, enabling efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models while maintaining low computational cost during inference.

extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling language models to trillion parameters efficiently
extraction_data.extension: Sparse expert routing via a trainable router that assigns tokens to experts based on probability, with load-balancing loss to ensure even expert utilization.
